name: Noesis Memory
description: Local-first semantic memory + context engine for OpenClaw. LanceDB + Ollama, no cloud. Hybrid search, cross-agent recall, and proactive context assembly (assemble/ingest hooks). Zero LLM cost.

embeddingModel.description: Ollama embedding model. Options: nomic-embed-text (768d, fast), mxbai-embed-large (1024d, accurate)

chunkSize.description: Chunk size in words for text splitting

chunkOverlap.description: Overlap in words between consecutive chunks

topK.description: Default number of search results to return

autoMigrate.description: Auto-import markdown memory files on plugin startup

indexQmdSessions.description: Watch and auto-index QMD session files

watchMemoryDirs.description: Watch agent memory directories for changes and auto-index .md files

gitLfsEnabled.description: Enable Git LFS persistence for LanceDB data

gitLfsRepo.description: GitHub repo for Git LFS snapshots (e.g. user/noesis-data)

annNprobe.description: IVF-PQ index nprobe: number of partitions to search. Higher = more accurate, slower.

annNumSubvectors.description: IVF-PQ index num_sub_vectors: compression granularity. Should be dim/8 or dim/16.

defaultTtlDays.description: Default TTL in days for new entries. 0 = never expire. Entries auto-expire after this many days.

autoCleanup.description: Automatically delete expired entries on plugin startup.

cleanupIntervalHours.description: Run TTL cleanup on this interval (hours). 0 = disabled.

contextEngineEnabled.description: Register Noesis as the active context engine (assemble + ingest hooks). Set plugins.slots.contextEngine=noesis to activate.

assembleInjectPriority.description: Minimum priority for Assemble hook injection. Entries >= this always enter context on every model run.

assembleMaxEntries.description: Max entries to inject via Assemble hook.

assembleMaxAgeDays.description: Max age (days) for Assemble injection. 0 = no limit.

errorLogPath.description: Path to dedicated error log file. Errors from init and all tools are written here as structured JSON lines.
